snippets.description: ListAccountIssues lists all account issues of a Merchant Center account.
snippets.title: merchantapi ListAccountIssues Sample

snippets.description: GetAccountTax returns the tax rules that match the conditions of GetAccountTaxRequest
snippets.title: merchantapi GetAccountTax Sample

snippets.description:
ListAccountTax lists the tax settings of the sub-accounts only in your
Merchant Center account.
This method can only be called on a multi-client account, otherwise it'll
return an error.
snippets.title: merchantapi ListAccountTax Sample

snippets.description: UpdateAccountTax updates the tax settings of the account.
snippets.title: merchantapi UpdateAccountTax Sample

snippets.description:
CreateAndConfigureAccount creates a standalone Merchant Center account with additional configuration.
Adds the user that makes the request as an admin for the new account.
snippets.title: merchantapi CreateAndConfigureAccount Sample

snippets.description:
DeleteAccount deletes the specified account regardless of its type: standalone, MCA or
sub-account. Deleting an MCA leads to the deletion of all of its
sub-accounts. Executing this method requires admin access.
The deletion succeeds only if the account does not provide services
to any other account and has no processed offers. You can use the `force`
parameter to override this.
snippets.title: merchantapi DeleteAccount Sample

snippets.description:
GetAccount retrieves an account from your Merchant Center account.
After inserting, updating, or deleting an account, it may take several
minutes before changes take effect.
snippets.title: merchantapi GetAccount Sample

snippets.description:
ListAccounts lists accounts accessible to the calling user and matching the
constraints of the request such as page size or filters.
This is not just listing the sub-accounts of an MCA, but all accounts the
calling user has access to including other MCAs, linked accounts,
standalone accounts and so on. If no filter is provided, then it returns
accounts the user is directly added to.
snippets.title: merchantapi ListAccounts Sample

snippets.description:
ListSubAccounts list all sub-accounts for a given multi client account. This is a
convenience wrapper for the more powerful `ListAccounts` method. This
method will produce the same results as calling `ListsAccounts` with the
following filter: 
`relationship(providerId={parent} AND service(type="ACCOUNT_AGGREGATION"))`
snippets.title: merchantapi ListSubAccounts Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateAccount updates an account regardless of its type: standalone, MCA or sub-account.
Executing this method requires admin access.
snippets.title: merchantapi UpdateAccount Sample

snippets.description: GetAutofeedSettings retrieves the autofeed settings of an account.
snippets.title: merchantapi GetAutofeedSettings Sample

snippets.description: UpdateAutofeedSettings updates the autofeed settings of an account.
snippets.title: merchantapi UpdateAutofeedSettings Sample

snippets.description: GetAutomaticImprovements retrieves the automatic improvements of an account.
snippets.title: merchantapi GetAutomaticImprovements Sample

snippets.description: UpdateAutomaticImprovements updates the automatic improvements of an account.

snippets.description: GetBusinessIdentity retrieves the business identity of an account.
snippets.title: merchantapi GetBusinessIdentity Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateBusinessIdentity updates the business identity of an account. Executing this method requires
admin access.
snippets.title: merchantapi UpdateBusinessIdentity Sample

snippets.description: GetBusinessInfo retrieves the business info of an account.
snippets.title: merchantapi GetBusinessInfo Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateBusinessInfo updates the business info of an account. Executing this method requires

snippets.description: CreateCheckoutSettings creates `CheckoutSettings` for the given merchant.
snippets.title: merchantapi CreateCheckoutSettings Sample

snippets.description:
DeleteCheckoutSettings deletes `CheckoutSettings` and unenrolls merchant from
`Checkout` program.
snippets.title: merchantapi DeleteCheckoutSettings Sample

snippets.description:
GetCheckoutSettings gets `CheckoutSettings` for the given merchant. This includes
information about review state, enrollment state and URL settings.
snippets.title: merchantapi GetCheckoutSettings Sample

snippets.description: UpdateCheckoutSettings updates `CheckoutSettings` for the given merchant.
snippets.title: merchantapi UpdateCheckoutSettings Sample

snippets.description:
GetEmailPreferences returns the email preferences for a Merchant Center account user.

Use the name=accounts/*/users/me/emailPreferences alias to get preferences
for the authenticated user.
snippets.title: merchantapi GetEmailPreferences Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateEmailPreferences updates the email preferences for a Merchant Center account user. MCA users
should specify the MCA account rather than a sub-account of the MCA.

Preferences which are not explicitly selected in the update mask will not
be updated.

It is invalid for updates to specify an UNCONFIRMED opt-in status value.

Use the name=accounts/*/users/me/emailPreferences alias to update
preferences
for the authenticated user.
snippets.title: merchantapi UpdateEmailPreferences Sample

snippets.description: LinkGbpAccount link the specified merchant to a GBP account for all countries.
snippets.title: merchantapi LinkGbpAccount Sample

snippets.description: ListGbpAccounts list the GBP accounts for a given merchant.
snippets.title: merchantapi ListGbpAccounts Sample

snippets.description:
ClaimHomepage claims a store's homepage. Executing this method requires admin access.

If the homepage is already claimed, this will recheck the
verification (unless the merchant is exempted from claiming, which also
exempts from verification) and return a successful response. If ownership
can no longer be verified, it will return an error, but it won't clear the
claim. In case of failure, a canonical error message will be returned: 
* PERMISSION_DENIED: user doesn't have the necessary permissions on this
MC account;
* FAILED_PRECONDITION: 
- The account is not a Merchant Center account;
- MC account doesn't have a homepage;
- claiming failed (in this case the error message will contain more
details).
snippets.title: merchantapi ClaimHomepage Sample

snippets.description: GetHomepage retrieves a store's homepage.
snippets.title: merchantapi GetHomepage Sample

snippets.description: UnclaimHomepage unclaims a store's homepage. Executing this method requires admin access.
snippets.title: merchantapi UnclaimHomepage Sample

snippets.description: UpdateHomepage updates a store's homepage. Executing this method requires admin access.
snippets.title: merchantapi UpdateHomepage Sample
